title: Blink Charging Leadership Moves and Strategic Reorganization
text: Blink Charging announced management reorganization with Mike Battaglia assuming CEO role effective February 1, 2025, replacing Brendan Jones who transitioned to Executive Chairman role. Battaglia brought 30 years of global experience leading execution in complex, international environments. The leadership transition reflected strategic pivot toward faster execution and disciplined capital deployment. Management reorganization focused on sales and deployment of next-generation technology. The new leadership emphasized building upon synergies from prior acquisitions and improving production efficiencies. Strategic focus areas included vertical integration, recurring revenue model development, and DC fast charging network expansion. The reorganization aimed to position company for profitability while maintaining focus on sustainable recurring revenue growth.
